'''''Redshift Runner''''' was a modified [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]] [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 Seeker]] owned by a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] named [[Elga Arbo]]. The ''Runner'' was one of the fastest commercial ships in the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services's]] registries. Arbo specialized in legal high-speed delivery of cargo. The interior cargo compartment added passenger quarters that allowed the ''Runner'' to double as a high-speed shuttle.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Arbo's co-pilot, [[Maceb Joodsen]], was a skilled starship mechanic from [[Demar]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

To upgrade the former scout ship's hyperdrive, Arbo borrowed [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from [[Gydio Lucone]]. Lucone lent Arbo the credits at a high interest rate in hopes that she would default and he could pressure her into [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] for him. The ship was modified to increase its speed with this money, mostly with a better [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

After missing a payment due to an Imperial shutdown of a port, the ''Runner'' and its crew were involved in an altercation with Lucone's goons where an injured Arbo lifted of in the ship piloted by Joodsen. A 20,000 credit reward was posted for the return of the ''Redshift Runner'' in good condition.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
